name: Texas TDLR All Licenses

agency.name: Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation

updateFrequency: unknown; verify on the Texas Open Data Portal before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: The dataset spans many TDLR license types and is not limited to construction or skilled-trade licenses.
Texas licensing is split across state and local authorities; this source does not represent every Texas contractor or trade authorization.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented yet. Any future download support should use the official open-data export responsibly and remain opt-in.
publicRecordsNotes: Official open-data source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The Texas Open Data Portal lists downloadable formats for the TDLR All Licenses dataset. A future adapter should narrow trade coverage carefully.
researchNotes: Good candidate for the first non-Florida data-portal adapter because the source has official open-data metadata and CSV export paths.
maintainerNotes: Do not treat all TDLR rows as contractor records without license-type filtering.
